Celine Blue Frame Printed Crew Neck Short Sleeve T-Shirt features a main body made from 24S tightly spun cotton in a plain knit fabric weighing 180g. The neckline uses 32S 1x1 rib knit at 300g, with finer yarn for a tighter, more elastic rib that resists deformation, keeping the collar crisp after repeated wear.

The silicone oil powder paste print combines silicone oil with special powder paste, creating a matte, slightly textured coating on the fabric. The print feels smooth with a slight powdery resistance, similar to fine suede or chalk, without obvious glue film or hardening. Celine knitted zip-up hoodie sweater, main fabric 100% superfine Merino wool, yarn count 26S2 (medium-thick knit yarn), double-ply twisted for firmness and softness. Celine branded emblem patch suede hooded jacket. The fabric is made of polyester filament yarn knitted on a circular knitting machine, interlooping warp and weft yarns into a double-sided knit structure with smooth loops on both sides. After dyeing, raising, carding, shearing, and napping, the fabric is formed. The suede texture is soft and nearly water-repellent, quickly wicking sweat to the surface for fast evaporation and good breathability. The suede traps air, creating a stable insulating layer around the body to prevent heat loss and provide excellent warmth. The interior quilting features a diagonal cane pattern, with precise machine speed and stitch density adjustments ensuring smooth, even stitches. This creates regular diagonal quilting lines that subtly enhance the overall quality when worn. The embroidered patch is fixed tautly with fabric and padding on the embroidery frame. The machine outlines the design’s fill area with sparse stitches on the padding layer, then covers it densely to form a slightly raised Arc de Triomphe shape. After finishing, the patch edges are clean with no burrs and the pattern is clear. Sizes: S-XL.

CELINE patch applique embroidered letter crewneck sweatshirt in regular fit. Celine solid color embroidered long-sleeve shirt is made of lightweight and highly breathable fabric using a high-density warp and low-density weft weaving process. The single-color flat embroidery on the front panel is achieved through a computerized embroidery machine with high precision control over the needle, thread, and fabric frame movements to create intricate patterns with minimal error.
